demo.title: hydrex.sh
demo.code:
# Lock HYDX for voting power
bankr prompt "Lock 1000 HYDX on Hydrex with rolling lock"

# Vote optimally to maximize fee earnings
bankr prompt "Vote optimally on Hydrex to maximize fees"

# Deposit single-sided liquidity
bankr prompt "Deposit 500 BNKR into the BNKR/WETH strategy on Hydrex"

# Claim oHYDX rewards and convert to veHYDX
bankr prompt "Claim my Hydrex oHYDX rewards"
bankr prompt "Convert my oHYDX to veHYDX on Hydrex"

setup: Requires Bankr skill for transaction execution
Fund wallet with HYDX and ETH on Base
Rolling locks auto-extend to 2-year duration — voting power activates next epoch
